commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in plain-language plugin approval prompts via `approvals.plugin.language`, wires the option through config, SDK approval rendering, Telegram/Matrix delivery, docs, generated baselines, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the renderer now emits `/approve ${request.id}` while the Telegram and Matrix simple-technical tests still expect literal `<id>`. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
